HomePage.title: Welcome to AI Agent Crafter
HomePage.subtitle: This tool helps you build instructions for your AI agents. Follow the steps and download your file at the end.

Step1.phaseDescription: Select the file type that will be created

Step2.phaseDescription: Which tool will you use with your agent?

githubCopilot.description: GitHub Copilot is an AI coding assistant developed by GitHub and OpenAI that suggests code and autocompletions while you build software.

gemini.description: Gemini is a language model by Google DeepMind designed for conversational tasks, content generation, and reasoning assistance.

chatGPT.description: ChatGPT is an OpenAI conversational assistant that generates human-like responses for support, writing, and productivity tasks.

codex.description: Codex is an OpenAI model specialized in code understanding and generation across multiple programming languages.

agentZero.description: Agent Zero is an AI agent framework that helps developers build and orchestrate autonomous agents for different workflows.

warp.description: Warp is a modern terminal focused on developer productivity, including AI-assisted command workflows.
